summary: Prepared the German-first localization review packet. The packet contains 320 review entries derived from the current localization export: 282 Localizable.strings entries and 38 Localizable.stringsdict plural entries. All German values are currently english-placeholder. No app resources were replaced and no native-review claim was made.

contract_status_changes.before: German review intake was blocked because no reviewed translation packet existed.
contract_status_changes.after: German has a reviewer-ready packet and return format; intake remains blocked until reviewed values are returned with reviewer/status metadata.

residual_risks: No translations were replaced in app resources.
No native or fluent German review has been completed.
Manual German per-app language behavior remains a separate diagnostic path.

next_recommended_reason: Only after reviewed German values return with reviewer/status metadata.
